The 20 Most Liked Posts on Instagram Of all the things to break a record for, the most liked picture on Instagram is probably one of the biggest challenges. Especially given that there are over 1.4 billion monthly users spending 33 minutes daily on the platform. You need a following (check out who has the most Instagram followers here). You could (debatably) do with some photography skills. You want to have something worth taking a picture of (again, debatably). As we’ll see in this list of top posts, not all of the above are totally necessary, but they’ll help. So, here goes. The 20 most liked posts on Instagram Let's dive in. 20. Kylian Mbappé signs with Real Madrid A new entry on the list, French captain Kylian Mbappé posts his excitement after signing with his dream club, Real Madrid. 19. Lionel Messi remembers Pelè On the day of the death of Pelè, Lionel Messi remembered one of the greatest professional football players of all time. 18. Happy Birthday, Tom Holland! Zendaya racks up millions of likes on this post wishing boyfriend, Tom Holland, a happy birthday. 17. Ronaldo on the field Here is the first post of many from Ronaldo. The post shows him at a friendly game between football clubs Paris Saint-Germain and Riyadh ST XI. Standing out in the busy and ever-engaged world of Instagram can feel challenging, especially with a massive 95 million new posts showing up every day. Yet, some posts beat the odds, getting tons of likes and becoming famous on Instagram. These iconic posts, often from celebrities, prove that creativity and fandom know no limits. If we look at the Indian Instagram scene, cricketer Virat Kohli's latest post celebrating the men's team's ICC T20 World Cup victory has become the most-liked Instagram post from India. At the time of publishing the post has garnered more than 18.5 million likes on the platform. The title was previously held by the wedding image of Bollywood stars Kiarna Advani and Sidharth Malhotra. However, don't assume that only celebrities have the most-liked posts on Instagram; even an egg photo has left its mark, amassing likes beyond expectations. With that bizarre statement, let’s dive into our list of the top 20 most-liked posts on Instagram. Top 10 Most-Liked Posts on Instagram: A Deep Dive 10. XXXTentacion The tenth most-liked post on Instagram is of American rapper Jahseh Dwayne Ricardo Onfroy, better known by his stage name XXXTentacion. The image appears to be an artwork for the posthumous release of his album Skins. The rapper was fatally shot in a premeditated murder attempt outside a motorcycle dealership in Deerfield Beach, Florida. Skins is one of the projects, that XXXTentacion worked on before his death, and features appearances from Travis Barker of Blink-182 and Kanye West. 9. Cristiano After Portugal’s Elimination FIFA-related posts usually exude celebration, but Cristiano adds a different dimension. Cristiano Ronaldo's decision to share his disappointment rather than conceal it resonated with many and ranked it among the top 10 most-liked posts on Instagram.

Cristiano Ronaldo posted a picture of himself with Georgina, holding their baby ultrasounds. In addition to this, he also let his fans know their gender. Most liked image post on Instagram The most liked image post on Instagram has 75,471,947 likes, and was achieved by Lionel Messi (Argentina), as verified on 24 March 2023. It depicts Messi holding aloft the FIFA World Cup Trophy after his country beat France in the final, which was held in Lusail Stadium in Lusail, Qatar. Top 10 Most Liked Instagram Posts - NeoReach With over 33.2 million likes, one of the most liked Instagram posts is from rapper XXXTentacion, also known as Jahseh Dwayne Ricardo Onfroy, before his death ... Instagram has over 500 million active daily users. Every second of every day, people like posts from their favorite brands, friends, celebrities, and influencers. While some users battle for the most likes through posting content, others simply enjoy engaging with the content on their feed. But why do likes really matter? Well, Instagram helps drive the economy. The highly followed influencers you know and love use their platforms to share products and brands straight to your feed. Likes fuel the economy through the power of marketing. If you were wondering what posts receive the most attention on Instagram, you have come to the right place. In this blog, we will give you a rundown on the most liked Instagram posts. Top 10 Most Liked Instagram Posts 1. Lionel Messi Winning the World Cup In 2022, the most liked Instagram post was given a new face thanks to professional Argentinian soccer player, Lionel Messi. Messi ended up scoring a goal that ensured Argentina won the FIFA World Cup. In the post that now has 75.2 million likes, he is lifting the trophy into the air, presenting a face full of happiness and excitement. 2. World Record Egg On January 4, 2019, the world came together to break the world record for the most liked picture on Instagram by liking a photograph of an egg. With 61.1 million likes, the egg successfully became the most liked photo on Instagram by a landslide. The egg beat out Kylie Jenner’s most liked picture on Instagram by 35 million likes in January of 2019. The caption of the most liked post read, “Let’s set a world record together and get the most liked post on Instagram. Beating the current world record held by Kylie Jenner (18 million)! We got this.” 3. Lionel Messi with World Cup Trophy You’ll find that Lionel Messi is actually on this list quite a few times and most of the Instagram posts that he’s managed to get into the most likes on have to do with him winning the FIFA World Cup for Argentina in 2022.
